description: The RadiantSearchBar component is most commonly used and found in the World Browser.

fields.SearchTerm: The term this is searching for.
fields.IsSearching: Whether this component is currently searching.
fields.SearchAnimTileSpeed: How fast the search animation scrolling speed should be.
fields.SearchAnimColor: What the color of the search bar should be while searching.
fields._textField: The text field for entering a search.
fields._searchText: The text UIX Component for searching
fields._defaultText: The text UIX Component that should be visible if a search term has not yet been entered.
fields._searchingVisual: The visual to show while searching
fields._cancelButton: The button that can be used to cancel a currently running search.
fields._defaultVisible: The field to drive with what should be visible by default.
fields._searchingAnimationColor: The field to drive for the color of the searching animation visual.
fields._searchingTextureOffset: The offset field to drive to create the searching animation scrolling visual.

methods.OnCancel: Called when the cancel button is touched.
